modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be distracting grammar usage and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to select grade options in D2L.

full_description_text: I am trying to enter grades in D2L. When I click the drop down arrows, there are no options showing. This happens in Internet Explorer and Firefox. I can't select anything to enter grades.
short_description: Unable to select grade options in D2L.
description: I am trying to enter grades in D2L. When I click the drop down arrows, there are no options showing. This happens in Internet Explorer and Firefox. I can't select anything to enter grades.
